title: How Breath-Control Can Change Your Life: A Systematic Review on Psycho-Physiological Correlates of Slow Breathing
headline: How Breath-Control Can Change Your Life: A Systematic Review on Psycho-Physiological Correlates of Slow Breath
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of breath-and-attention meditation examined emotional wellbeing.
keyFindings: See the linked paper for detailed results.
limitations: Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.

The practice studied (breath-and-attention meditation) is not the Miracle of Mind practice, so its findings don't transfer directly — though the shared slow, paced breath-regulation component may make some transfer plausible (see “Why this matters for the 7-minute practice” below).
simplifiedTitle: How Breath-Control Can Change Your Life: A Systematic Review on Psycho-Physiological Correlates of Slow Breath
aiSnippet: Meta-analysis / Systematic review, Frontiers in human neuroscience (2018). A meta-analysis / systematic review of breath-and-attention meditation examined emotional wellbeing.
whyItMatters: MoM shares slow, paced breath regulation with the practice studied here. Because the benefit is linked to that mechanism rather than to any one method, it's reasonable to expect it may extend to MoM as well — though MoM hasn't been studied directly for this outcome.
